- [ ] New Feature

---

## 🔹 Deployment Checklist (MANDATORY)

- [ ] Code builds successfully
- [ ] Smoke testing completed
- [ ] Core functionality tested
- [ ] End-to-end flow verified
- [ ] API responses validated
- [ ] DB changes verified (if applicable)
- [ ] Logs checked (no errors)
- [ ] UI/UX verified
- [ ] Edge cases tested
- [ ] No impact on existing features (basic regression done)

---

## 🔹 Evidence (REQUIRED)

### 📸 Screenshots / Video Proof
<!-- Attach UI screenshots or screen recording -->

### 🔗 API Response / Postman Collection
<!-- Paste response or attach screenshot -->

### 📊 Logs / Console Output
<!-- Attach logs if applicable -->

### 🧪 Test Data Used
<!-- Mention test inputs / scenarios -->

---

## 🔹 Impact Analysis

- Modules affected:
- Areas to monitor after deployment:
- Risk Level:
  - [ ] Low
  - [ ] Medium
  - [ ] High

---

## 🔹 Pre-Merge Validation

- [ ] Code reviewed by at least one developer
- [ ] QA checklist verified
- [ ] Ready for merge

---

## 🔹 Developer Declaration

- [ ] I confirm that all checklist items are completed
- [ ] I have attached valid evidence for testing
- [ ] This PR is ready for QA validation
